resourceTemplates.name: list-anthropic-memories
resourceTemplates.title: List Anthropic memories
resourceTemplates.description: List memories in an Anthropic memory store. The secure scraper requires the current user to be an owner of the parent memory store.

resourceTemplates.name: get-anthropic-memory
resourceTemplates.title: Get Anthropic memory
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieve a memory from an Anthropic memory store. The secure scraper requires the current user to be an owner of the parent memory store.
